arts.ttl: Liverpool's back-up brigade give belief they will power to glory as substitutes make the difference in last-gasp Brentford victory
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: He had only played a cameo off the bench but he was saluted like a king by the travelling Kop.

arts.ttl: 'Are Liverpool best team in world right now?' - MOTD pundits on 'risky' Reds
arts.sum: "A Liverpool blip was put to bed." Gary Lineker, Danny Murphy and Ashley Williams discuss the performance and late goals that saw the Reds win 2-0 at Brentford.

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez now out on his own at the top of one stats table after his Liverpool double at Brentford
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez was the hero of the hour for Liverpool as they saw off Brentford and then later saw Arsenal drop points to extend their...
